name: Django
summary: A comfortable, no-attitude French brasserie that was a longtime staple of the downtown Des Moines dining scene for nearly two decades.

name: Panka Peruvian
summary: Authentic and elevated Peruvian cuisine that provided a warm, welcoming, and highly-rated space on Ingersoll Avenue.

name: Americana
summary: Iconic downtown spot known for its sprawling weekend bombshell brunch and expansive views of the Pappajohn Sculpture Park.

name: Cactus Bob's BBQ Corral
summary: Long-running neighborhood joint known for smoked meats, baked beans, and a laid-back, western-themed dining room.

name: Palms DSM
summary: Upscale African-Caribbean style restaurant taking the metro by storm with dishes like braised oxtail and honey suya wings.

name: Scoops by Beth
summary: Modern ice cream parlor in Highland Park offering inventive, small-batch flavors in a beautifully lit brick-and-mortar space.

name: Bar Martinez
summary: Sophisticated lounge serving modern twists on classic cocktails in the historic Highland Park neighborhood.

name: Masao
summary: Unique French-Japanese fusion spot in the East Village, offering a refined blend of sushi, plates, and pastries.

name: Lachele's Fine Foods and the Fitz
summary: Retro-inspired eatery delivering highly updated, locally-sourced, and elevated takes on classic American diner fare.

name: Highland Underground
summary: Groovy '70s-style lounge offering fondue and craft cocktails in a nostalgic, cozy basement setting.

name: Toyo Ramen & Japanese Street Foods
summary: Fast-casual authentic Japanese ramen, gyoza, and donburi bowls in the District at Prairie Trail.

name: Black Cat Ice Cream (Downtown)
summary: Second location of the beloved handcrafted, small-batch artisanal ice cream shop utilizing grass-fed dairy and local ingredients.

name: Kura Sushi
summary: Interactive conveyor-belt sushi bar experience arriving at Jordan Creek Town Center.

name: The Breakfast Club (Waukee)
summary: Sweet and savory breakfast and brunch spot with a signature vintage comic book-themed décor expanding to Kettlestone Central.

name: Bubbies BBQ
summary: Slow-smoked meats and all the fixings expanding the culinary scene in Pleasant Hill.

name: Table 128
summary: Beloved elevated American dining that successfully reopened in a fresh downtown location after previously closing its West Des Moines spot.

name: Prime & Providence
summary: Upscale dining experience focused on prime steaks, wood-fired dishes, and exceptional service in West Des Moines.
